cleavage agent: Samples were then digested with LysC (20 ng µl−1)
fractionation method: TMT mixes were fractionated using basic pH reversed-phase fractionation
fragmentation method: Fragment ion spectra were produced through collision-induced dissociation
instrument: TMT and label-free samples were analysed using a Orbitrap Eclipse mass spectrometer
labeling: Ten-microlitre volumes of tandem mass tag (TMT) stock solutions
